query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A person sits on a sofa in a living room. A floor lamp with a tapered shade stands behind the sofa near a bright window. An upholstered armchair with rounded cushions sits nearby. The room has plain walls and fabric-covered furniture.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A blurred, black-and-white photograph shows a person sitting on a sofa in a living room, rendered with smeared features and dissolved textures that lack fine detail. A floor lamp with a tapered shade and a nearby upholstered armchair appear as soft, indistinct shapes beside a brightly lit window, the entire scene cast in muted, washed-out monochrome tones.
